target: ACL27 supplement page 33 selected6 neutral navigation companion v2
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer checklist locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

layout_iteration.before: The selected6 neutral cases were shown by a generic two-image suppcasepair float. Page 33 had two horizontal panels and substantial empty space.
layout_iteration.after: The same selected case evidence is reflowed into a 1500 x 1900 companion board with registered still/route crops, detail tiles, a compact evidence strip, and an AI selected6-neutral gate slot used only for exposition.
layout_iteration.result: Accepted: page 33 remains page 33 in a 45-page supplement, active245 at 90 dpi roughly doubles, and the caption preserves the navigation-metric boundary.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the board keeps case 493_493 and case 484_484 visible, expands the evidence into still and route crops, and keeps the AI slot as a bounded review-gate schematic.
visual_review.pdf_page_33: PASS: the figure and caption fit on page 33 without clipping, overlap, or page-count spill.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: pages 32 and 34 remain the selected6 divergent and 0036/0066 asymmetric case pages, respectively.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption says the AI-generated selected6-neutral gate schematic is used only for exposition and the visual expansion does not become an aggregate navigation metric.
